generationTime.question: How long does generation take?
generationTime.answer: Most images are processed in 5-15 seconds. Complex images with detailed reflections may take up to 30 seconds. You can process multiple images simultaneously.

phonePhotos.question: Can I upload phone photos?
phonePhotos.answer: Absolutely! AutoStudio is specifically designed for mobile photos. iPhone, Android, any smartphone camera works perfectly.

colorAccuracy.question: Does it preserve the original car color?
colorAccuracy.answer: Yes, our technology preserves exact color accuracy. The original paint color, reflections, and details are maintained with 99.9% accuracy.

logoBranding.question: Can I add my dealership logo?
logoBranding.answer: Yes! All plans include logo branding. Upload your logo once and it will be automatically added to all your generated images.

cancelSubscription.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancelSubscription.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. No long-term contracts or hidden fees.

commercialUse.question: Can I use images commercially?
commercialUse.answer: Yes, all generated images are yours to use commercially. Use them on your website, listings, social media, and advertisements.

usageBasedBilling.title: Usage-Based Billing
usageBasedBilling.subtitle: Need more than your plan includes? We offer flexible pay-as-you-go pricing for extra usage.

changePlans.question: Can I change plans anytime?
changePlans.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate any differences.

exceedLimit.question: What happens if I exceed my monthly limit?
exceedLimit.answer: You'll be charged for extra usage at our pay-as-you-go rates. We'll notify you when you're approaching your limit so there are no surprises.

rollover.question: Do unused generations roll over?
rollover.answer: No, unused generations reset at the end of each billing cycle. We recommend choosing a plan that matches your typical monthly usage.
